title: Chunky Offline
description: An add-on/extension of Chunky to generate chunks when no players are online.
body:
# Chunky Offline

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1327308441324097681?label=discord&color=blue&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/5UdcDa5xNC)
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/chunky-offline?label=modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/chunky-offline)
[![Curse Forge](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1369487?label=curse%20forge&logo=curseforge&color=orange)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chunky-offline)
[![Donate](https://shields.io/badge/ko--fi-donate-ff5f5f?logo=ko-fi)](https://ko-fi.com/lullaby45743)
[![Donate](https://shields.io/badge/paypal-donate-ff5f5f?logo=paypal&color=blue)](https://paypal.me/lucianobrumer)

## 📖 Description

Chunky Offline is an extension of [Chunky](https://github.com/pop4959/Chunky) to generate chunks when no players are online and it runs automatically (you don't need to run any command, is a automatic process started by Chunky Offline), the default values are radius as `10000` and center at `0 0`.

## ⌨️ Commands

Change the config:

```mcfunction
/function chunky_offline:config/set {"radius":10000,"x":0,"z":0}
```

Disable/enable global messages:

```mcfunction
/function chunky_offline:config/global_messages/<enable | disable>
```

Force start (only if you has been canceled the process manually):

```mcfunction
/function chunky_offline:chunky/force_start
```
